About

Senior Project Manager

A seasoned Senior Project Manager at Infosys Limited with extensive expertise in Enterprise Package Application Services (EPAS), delivering mission-critical ERP and enterprise solutions for global clients across diverse industry verticals.

Based at the prestigious Trivandrum SEZ Unit-1, Technopark Campus II, driving end-to-end program governance, cross-functional team leadership, and strategic delivery excellence in large-scale enterprise transformation programs.

A trusted partner to clients, bringing deep domain knowledge in enterprise application landscapes, agile delivery frameworks, and stakeholder management — ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned to business objectives.

Professional Experience

Current Position
Senior Project Manager
Infosys Limited — Enterprise Package Application Services
Current
  • Leading end-to-end delivery of large-scale enterprise package application projects for global clients across multiple verticals.
  • Establishing and managing PMO frameworks, governance models, and delivery controls for programs with multi-crore budgets.
  • Coordinating cross-functional offshore-onsite delivery teams of 30+ members ensuring SLA adherence and quality outcomes.
  • Driving client satisfaction through proactive communication, escalation management, and executive stakeholder engagement.
  • Championing process improvements, automation initiatives, and best-practice adoption within EPAS delivery units.
